untrusted.title: Untrusted Proxy Detected
untrusted.description: Your request was blocked because it originated from an untrusted proxy or network address. Contact the administrator if you believe this is an error

internalError.title: Internal Server Error
internalError.description: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request

notFound.title: Resource not found
notFound.description: The requested resource could not be found on this server. Please check the URL and try again.

unknown.title: An unexpected error occurred
unknown.description: We encountered an unknown issue. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.

login.heroDescription: Secure access to your self-hosted desktop workspace
login.title: Login
login.description: Welcome back. Please enter your username and password

errors.generic: An error occurred during login. Please try again

register.heroDescription: Set up your Namorix desktop credentials to get started
register.title: Create account
register.description: Register when your administrator has opened register

errors.generic: An error occurred during register. Please try again

register.initialRegistration: Initial registration: This account will be granted Administrative privileges
register.success: Account created successfully. Taking you to login...
